reasoning: Given the limitation of no search tools, I rely heavily on the community estimate of 4% from October 30, 2025. It is extremely unlikely that a specific legislative provision to make domestic content mandatory for 45Y PTCs would be written, passed, and enacted between November 9 and December 31, 2025, if it wasn't already highly likely and well-known by late October. The low 4% market estimate strongly implies this provision was not included in the main reconciliation drafts, or the reconciliation bill itself failed or was stalled. Therefore, I will stick to the community prediction of 4%.
